title: Baby Legends (Cobblemon)
body:
### **_Baby Legends!_**
# 
Baby Legends is a data pack that will add pre-evolutions to Pokémon's many legendarys!

Some even get moves they cant learn otherwise!

**HOW TO INSTALL**
Download the latest version and place the ZIP into both your World/Servers datapack folder and your Resource pack folder.


This addon does not add models for legendary pokemon!

A google doc with all the info for spawns and evolutions can be found [Here!](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1JC_45NLugBsg6-akij34MxZ1Bhw3-4FlTJN-Vn1IYx0/edit?usp=sharing)

#

There will be a select few legendarys/mythicals that _wont_ receive a pre-evo, though that can always change in the future.



<details>
<summary>
       The current list of pokemon not reciving one:   </summary>
Jirachi,
Lunala,
Solgaleo,
Meloetta,
Genesect,
Manaphy,
Sinnoh Lake Trio,
Marshadow,
Urshifu,
Hoopa,
Shaymin,
Diancie,
Calyrex,
all of the Ultra beasts,
And the legendary paradoxes.


</details>

**_You may use this pack on servers as long as they are free and not locked behind a paywall. (crates,online store etc)._**
